description_long: This is a cylindrical metal bucket or barrel with a weathered, industrial appearance. The exterior is predominantly gray with visible signs of wear, rust, and surface abrasions, suggesting prolonged outdoor or heavy-duty use. A prominent feature is the set of gold-colored metallic reinforcements, including a large cross-shaped band on one side and additional brackets, which provide structural support and visual distinction. The rim is reinforced with a darker metallic band, and the interior appears hollow and unfinished. There are no visible labels or markings, but the object has a utilitarian, robust design suitable for urban or industrial environments. The surface texture is rough and pitted, especially near the base where small raised bumps are present.
description: A weathered, gray metal barrel or bucket with gold-colored cross-shaped reinforcements and a rough, industrial finish. The object is sturdy, hollow, and designed for heavy-duty urban or industrial use.
description_view_0: This view shows the bucket's gold cross-shaped reinforcement and pitted lower surface, highlighting the main decorative and structural feature.
description_view_1: The rear view reveals a plain, worn metal surface with two rectangular metal patches and no visible reinforcements.
description_view_2: This side view displays part of the gold reinforcement wrapping around the bucket and a protruding side bracket.
description_view_3: The front view prominently features the full gold cross-shaped reinforcement and the textured, pitted lower section.
